name: bladevault
description: A sharp, local-first knife collection manager.

scripts.desktop:smoke: npm run build:desktop && npm run rebuild:desktop-native && npm run sync:desktop-runtime && node scripts/run-desktop-smoke.cjs
scripts.dist:desktop: npm run build:desktop && npm run rebuild:desktop-native && npm run sync:desktop-runtime && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.dist:desktop:dir: npm run build:desktop && npm run rebuild:desktop-native && npm run sync:desktop-runtime && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --dir --publish never
scripts.dist:desktop:mac:unsigned: npm run build:desktop && npm run rebuild:desktop-native && npm run sync:desktop-runtime && BLADEVAULT_MAC_SIGN=0 BLADEVAULT_MAC_NOTARIZE=0 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg --publish never
scripts.dist:desktop:mac:signed: npm run build:desktop && npm run rebuild:desktop-native && npm run sync:desktop-runtime && BLADEVAULT_MAC_SIGN=1 BLADEVAULT_MAC_NOTARIZE=1 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg --publish never
